approach: THESIS QUALITY FOCUS (high-quality data for proof-of-concept validation)

parameters.MIN_PERIODS_rationale: 62 brands have ≥40 non-zero periods (43.4% — HIGH QUALITY). Thesis focus: fewer high-quality brands > more low-quality brands.
parameters.LAGS_rationale: Weekly (1-4), bi-weekly (8), yearly (13) capture different time-scale dependencies. Validated via ACF/PACF analysis.
parameters.ROLLING_WINDOWS_rationale: 4-week (Nielsen calendar) and 13-week (quarterly) windows aligned with business cycles
parameters.HOLIDAY_MONTHS_rationale: Top 25% sales months (≥464,156,681 units). Validated via seasonal decomposition.
parameters.TRAIN_END_rationale: 24 months training data (2 years for stable pattern learning)
